title: Undertake basic shearing and crutching
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake basic shearing and crutching demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify shearing and wool harvesting work requirements

pcs.text: Check federal and/or state shearing awards and agreements associated with shearing sheep with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check federal and/or state shearing awards and agreements associated with shearing sheep with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check federal and/or state shearing awards and agreements associated with shearing sheep with supervisor.

pcs.text: Determine shearing and wool harvesting team roles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine shearing and wool harvesting team roles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine shearing and wool harvesting team roles.

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members or supervisor to check shearing equipment for correct operation, and report any potential or existing hazards in the workplace prior to commencing work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members or supervisor to check shearing equipment for correct operation, and report any potential or existing hazards in the workplace prior to commencing work.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble comb and cutter on handpiece in line with manufacturer specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set lead and throw.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set tension to enable comb and cutter to cut wool cleanly with minimum friction.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lubricate working surfaces and moving parts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lubricate working surfaces and moving parts.

pcs.text: Prepare for exercises to warm up the body

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform back, shoulder, leg, arm and abdomen stretches.

elements.title: Catch sheep for shearing

pcs.text: Catch and move sheep in line with work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Catch and move sheep in line with work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Catch and move sheep in line with work health and safety (WHS), industry and animal welfare standards.

pcs.text: Move sheep from the catching pen to the shearing board unassisted using safe manual handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move sheep from the catching pen to the shearing board unassisted using safe manual handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move sheep from the catching pen to the shearing board unassisted using safe manual handling techniques.

pcs.text: Position sheep for shearing and crutching
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position sheep for shearing and crutching?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position sheep for shearing and crutching.

elements.title: Remove wool

pcs.text: Activate handpiece and position in readiness for shearing and crutching operations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Activate handpiece and position in readiness for shearing and crutching operations.

pcs.text: Shear and crutch section of sheep completely and unassisted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shear and crutch section of sheep completely and unassisted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shear and crutch section of sheep completely and unassisted.

pcs.text: Release sheep safely from the board into the count-out pens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Release sheep safely from the board into the count-out pens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Release sheep safely from the board into the count-out pens.

pcs.text: Tally crutched and shorn sheep in line with workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tally crutched and shorn sheep in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace biosecurity and environment policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace biosecurity and environment policies.
